evals.prompt: Can you extract and summarize the content from this Wikipedia page about artificial intelligence? https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Artificial_intelligence
evals.expected_output: A cleaned markdown version of the Wikipedia article with structured sections and a concise summary highlighting key points about AI definition, history, approaches, applications, and ethical considerations.

evals.prompt: I need the main content from this tech blog post about React performance optimization. Please extract the text and give me a summary. https://react.dev/learn/performance
evals.expected_output: Extracted React documentation content about performance optimization, with cleaned markdown preserving code examples and technical details, plus a summary of key optimization techniques and best practices.

evals.prompt: Summarize this news article about climate change for me. https://www.bbc.com/news/science-environment-67718733
evals.expected_output: Clean news article text with journalistic structure preserved, summary highlighting key findings, sources, dates, and implications of the climate change report.
